reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
강아지 노즈워크장난감 사면서
저에게 필요한 장바구니도 구매해봐요
우선 키링이 되는 제품이라 마음에 들었구요
생각보다는 장바구니가 작지만 간단하게 장보기에
편리하게 잘사용할것같아요
우선 바다거북이 너무 귀엽고 가방에 달고 다니니
꼭 필수템으로 잘 달고 다닐것같네요
reviews.content_en: I bought a nose work toy for my dog and decided to pick up a shopping bag I needed too. First of all, I really liked that it works as a keychain. The shopping bag is smaller than I expected, but it seems like it'll be convenient and easy to use for quick shopping trips. The sea turtle is so cute, and now that I'm carrying it on my bag, I feel like I'll definitely keep it with me as an essential item 🐢

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content:
#체험단 귀여운 거부기가 제게 서프라이즈 선물처럼 왔다네 왔어🐢 귀여움의 상징 바잇미와 모던함 디자인의 정석 무신사 어스가 같이 한 키링백이에요🤎 
그냥 키링으로 달고다니기에도 귀염가득 포인트 되는데, 환경을 생각해서 비닐백 대신 장바구니로 사용할 수 있는 가방으로 짜잔! 활용 가능합니다. 
우리집 보리는 본인 장난감인줄 알고 관심 갖다가, 사진촬영 모델이 되어주셨고요?ㅋㅋㅋ 실제 회사 다닐때 도시락(바나나/계란/두유 등등) 챙겨다니기에 너무 딱 좋을 사이즈에요💚🩵
우리 보리 모색이랑도 톤앤무드 너무 잘 맞고요! 다른 동물들 디자인도 너무 귀여우니까 선택하기 어려울 거 같아요 >_< 
전 귀여운게 최고이니까 바다거북 알러빗 ! 찐 활용&사용&장식 후기니까 믿고 구매하세용😀😀
reviews.content_en: #ReviewUnit This adorable little guy came to me like a surprise gift! 🐢 It's a keychain bag that combines BITE ME - the symbol of cuteness - with MUSINSA EARTH's modern design aesthetic 🤎 It's cute enough just to carry as a keychain and makes a great accent, but here's the twist - you can also use it as a shopping bag instead of plastic bags to help the environment! My Bori thought it was her own toy at first and got interested, then became our photo model ㅋㅋㅋ It's the perfect size to carry around lunch (bananas/eggs/soy milk, etc.) when I go to work! 💚🩵 The color and vibe match so well with Bori's coat too! The other animal designs are all so cute that it'll be hard to choose 😭 Since I'm all about cuteness, I'm team sea turtle! This is genuine feedback from actual use, storage, and decoration, so shop with confidence! 😀😀

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
처음에 귀여운 키링인줄 알았는데 뒤에
주머니에 숨겨져있는 장바구니 아이들 데리고 산책가방에 달았다가 오는길에 장보기 딱이에요 너무 귀여운데
튼튼해요 누가봐도 장바구니인줄 몰라요 키링이네
했다가 장바구니네 하는 너무 실용적인 제품이에오 
꿀템🩷🩷🩷
reviews.content_en: At first I thought it was just a cute keychain, but then I found the hidden shopping bag in the pocket! I attached it to my walk bag when taking the kids out, and it's perfect for quick shopping on the way back. It's so cute but also super durable! No one would even guess it's a shopping bag just by looking - it looks like a keychain, then it's a shopping bag... such a practical product! 🩷🩷🩷 A total gem!

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너어무 귀여워요~~
그래서 셋트로 재구매
장바구니가 너무 크지도 작지도 않고, 수납력도 굿굿
가지고 다니기에도, 펼쳐 들고다니기에도 넘 예쁨~♡♡♡♡
reviews.content_en: It's so cute!! That's why I repurchased it as a set. The shopping bag isn't too big or too small, and the storage capacity is great. It's perfect for carrying around and looks pretty even when unfolded! ♡♡♡♡

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
너어무 예뻐요.
많이 들어가고 넘 편리해요~♡♡♡♡
reviews.content_en: It's so pretty. It holds a lot and is super convenient! ♡♡♡♡

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 거북사랑단이 놓칠 수 없는 아이템...! 손난로같이 동그랗고 보들보들한게 애착인형 수준이에요... 욕심은 많은데 가방은 맨날 작은거 드는 사람으로서... 가끔 편의점 들리거나 놀러가서 뭐 이것저것 샀을 때 장바구니도 유용하고 키링으로써도 아주 만점입니다 선물로도 추천!! 😘
reviews.content_en: A must-have item for turtle lovers! It's round and soft like a hand warmer - I'm attached to it like a comfort toy. Since I'm someone who always carries a small bag despite wanting to bring everything, the shopping bag comes in handy when I stop by the convenience store or go out and end up buying random things. And as a keychain, it gets a perfect score! Highly recommend as a gift too! 😘

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이동가방에 달고 나가니까 너무 귀여워요!!
그리고 인형이랑 장바구니가 일체형이라, 잃어버릴 걱정이 없어서 너무너무 좋아요~~
키링백 달고 외출해서 신나게 놀다가!! 용품점 들러서 쇼핑하구 장바구니에 담아서 돌아오면 딱이에요 ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I attached it to my travel bag and it's so cute!! And since the figure and shopping bag are integrated, I don't have to worry about losing it - it's amazing!! I take the keychain bag out for a fun adventure, then stop by a pet supply store to shop and pack everything in the shopping bag to head home. Perfect! ㅎㅎ

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 배송도 안전하게! 도착했으며! 실물이 더 귀염뽀짝하고!! 장바구니도 같이 있어서 좋아요! ㅎㅎㅎ응차봉지도 넣을 수 있을거같아욤!
reviews.content_en: The shipping was safe and it arrived! The actual product is even cuter than expected!! And it comes with a shopping bag too, which is great! ㅎㅎㅎ I think you could even fit waste bags in it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 보들보들하고 기엽고 비싸요 ㅎㅋㅋㅋ 맘에 듭니당 거북이 양쪽 다리 간격이 달라서 좀 당황햇지만 원래 그런가봐요..? 잘쓸게요
reviews.content_en: It's soft, cute, and pricey ㅎㅋㅋㅋ I like it though! The turtle's leg gaps are different on each side so I was a bit surprised, but I guess that's how it's supposed to be? I'll use it well.

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content: 귀여워요. 가방에 키링처럼 달고 다니다가 필요할때 장바구니로 잘 쓸 수 있을 것 같아요.
reviews.content_en: It's cute. I think I'll be able to use it well as a keychain on my bag and then use it as a shopping bag whenever I need it.
